name: 奪取修為（靈力抽取）
description: 假千金用系統能力強行奪走女主千年修為，將戰力對比瞬間逆轉。這是全劇最大的危機時刻，女主從最強變為最弱。
tags: 仙力被抽離的視覺特效+女主虛弱倒地的衝擊畫面

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: I've used up all the points in the system. / You stole the fortune of your Xie family for future generations. / And all your cultivation. / Dare to harm my descendants / My ancestor will fight you to the death!
examples.context: 仙力被抽離的視覺特效+女主虛弱倒地的衝擊畫面
